lead: This machine uses separate lines for normal and reset. Select the route first, then read the checker.

summaryBoxes.label: Base plan
summaryBoxes.value: Normal route and reset route are handled separately.

summaryBoxes.label: Note
summaryBoxes.value: Read the result only after the route is fixed.

factTable: Split the table into normal and reset.
Do not mix the two routes.

sections.title: How to use
body: The checker is built around two entry points.
Choose the matching route first, then confirm the result card and summary table together.

sections.title: Memo
body: If the current state is not clear, stay on the safer side.
This page only reorganizes the current checker rules.
